attributes.action: Put more restrictions into building new housing developments on green fields.
attributes.additional_details: Great Britain is slowly losing everything that is Great about it. Green belts were put in place to stop towns merging and now they get reclassified as grey belt and built on. Our peaceful objections are not listened to and we are supposed to be in a democracy. We need to preserve our countyside for the future. You are not getting to the route cause of the problems just putting on a band aid.
attributes.background: Give more power to the local parish and councils to decide based on local residents views. Stop developers finding loop holes to allow them to develop even if it is rejected.

rejection.details: We are not clear what specific action you are seeking from the UK Government or Parliament. You could start a new petition setting out more clearly what you would like to change.
